note: Challenge 5 — OT and safety systems are siloed today. These are the rules the Compliance & Safety agent gates actions against.

rules.detail: Any action that disables, bypasses, or modifies a safety interlock or guard is HALTED and escalated to the safety officer.
Emergency maintenance opening a machine requires a lockout/tagout procedure and a logged safety sign-off before the window opens. Permitted with sign-off.
Speed reduction within OEM limits, job rerouting, and log updates carry no incremental safety risk.

audit_requirements.note: Audits currently require manual cross-referencing of 20+ systems; the agent assembles this from the run audit log automatically.
